title: Hydrocarbon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Hydrocarbons''' were organic compounds that were composed of a combination of the following elements: [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]], [[Nitrogen/Legends|nitrogen]], [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]], and [[Hydrogen/Legends|hydrogen]].

The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shaymore]] contained hydrocarbon-bearing fossil fuels that were mined by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The planet [[Kheedar]] processed hydrocarbons.
